summary: BLS source package that exposes LAUS constants and forwards metro LAUS workflows without depending on the shared metro package.
Public BLS package surface for LAUS helpers plus dynamic access to the metro LAUS ingest workflow.
Defines Glynn-Fox metro LAUS series-ID constants and builders for BLS annual labor-market ingestion.
Owns ACS-specific aggregation from tract-level ACS inputs into Glynn-Fox metros using shared metro county membership.
Owns PEP-specific aggregation from county population estimates into Glynn-Fox metros with county coverage diagnostics.
Owns PIT-specific aggregation from CoC counts into Glynn-Fox metros with member-CoC coverage tracking.
Owns ZORI-specific aggregation from county rent series into Glynn-Fox metros for both monthly and yearly workflows.
Public Census geometry entrypoint that re-exports TIGER tract, TIGER county, and tract-relationship ingestion helpers from the census subpackage.
Source-owned HUD boundary entrypoints that expose the Exchange and Open Data ingest helpers without routing callers through the generic ingest namespace.
Lazy public API for ACS ingestion, translation, and aggregation helpers that preserves the root import surface without statically coupling the package to its child modules.
Public NHGIS geometry entrypoint that exposes tract and county ingest helpers plus the extract error and supported-year contract.
Owns ACS tract-to-geometry aggregation logic, overlap validation, and Connecticut planning-region remapping used by both CoC and metro ACS workflows.
Compatibility facade that forwards legacy hhplab.measures.acs imports to the ACS-owned aggregation implementation in hhplab.acs.aggregate.
Builds the frozen audit panel artifacts while lazily proxying ACS, metro, and rent helpers so the root package does not statically reintroduce source-package cycles.
Verifies the refactored source package entrypoints and lazy root exports for HUD, Census, NHGIS, and PIT surfaces.
Public PIT package surface that combines ingest, parsing, QA, registry, and metro aggregation helpers behind a single source-owned entrypoint.
Shared core package for configuration, canonical naming, storage-root resolution, provenance helpers, source registries, geography helpers, and lazy public exports used across HHP-Lab.
ACS source package for tract-level ingest, decennial-vintage translation, variable contracts, CoC aggregation, and metro-specific ACS aggregation workflows.
ACS ingest package for downloading tract-level ACS5 measures and metro-level ACS1 unemployment series into canonical curated artifacts.
Census source facade that re-exports TIGER tract, TIGER county, and tract-relationship ingestion workflows behind a stable public package.
Census ingest package for downloading TIGER counties, TIGER tracts, and tract-relationship files, then normalizing and saving canonical geometry artifacts.
Typer command package that exposes agent-friendly ingestion, aggregation, validation, migration, registry, recipe, and diagnostics workflows for HHP-Lab.
Geospatial utility package for reading, normalizing, validating, and Connecticut-specific remapping of boundary geometries used by ingest and aggregation workflows.
HUD source facade that exposes CoC boundary ingest workflows from the legacy generic ingest modules through a source-owned public package.
Legacy compatibility ingest package for HUD boundary workflows and metro-native BLS LAUS ingestion while source-owned public APIs migrate to dedicated packages.
Measure diagnostics package that preserves the historical measures surface while computing crosswalk coverage and aggregation-quality diagnostics.
Shared metro-domain package for Glynn-Fox definitions, membership artifacts, IO, validation, and thin facades over source-specific metro aggregations.
NHGIS source package for ingesting tract and county geometry extracts and exposing the supported-year contract for those imports.
Panel assembly package that aligns PIT, ACS, ACS1, LAUS, and ZORI inputs into canonical CoC and metro panels, then validates, finalizes, and diagnoses the results.
PEP source package for ingesting county population estimates and aggregating them to CoC and metro geographies with provenance and diagnostics.
PIT source package for HUD Exchange discovery and parsing, curated vintage registry tracking, QA, and metro aggregation of homelessness counts.
PIT ingest package that discovers HUD Exchange source files, downloads annual data, parses canonical schemas, and writes curated PIT artifacts.
Recipe engine package that validates declarative build specs, resolves yearly task graphs, executes resample and join workflows, and persists manifests and panel outputs.
Boundary-registry package that persists curated vintage records, health checks, and schema contracts for analysis geographies.
ZORI source package for ingesting Zillow county rent series, building ACS-based weights, aggregating rents to CoC and metro geographies, and reporting coverage diagnostics.
Visualization package that renders CoC boundary maps from curated geometries and registry lookups for operator-facing inspection.
Crosswalk construction package that builds tract and county shares from source geometries into analysis geographies and optionally derives population weights.
Comprehensive regression test package covering CLI behavior, ingest paths, crosswalks, metro definitions, recipes, panel assembly, and output contracts across the codebase.
